name: Unit Economics Model
summary: A framework for understanding whether your business model creates or destroys value on a per-customer basis.
whenToUseIt: Monthly when reviewing financials, before fundraising, or when deciding whether to increase acquisition spending.
steps: Calculate CAC (total S&M spend / new customers acquired)
Calculate LTV (ARPU × average lifespan × gross margin)
Calculate payback period (CAC / monthly gross profit per customer)
example: SaaS company: $10K marketing spend, 20 new customers = $500 CAC. $100/month ARPU, 24-month lifespan, 80% margin = $1,920 LTV. LTV:CAC = 3.84:1 (healthy). Payback period = $500 / ($100 × 0.8) = 6.25 months.
